samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer with specific timing requirements.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Clock signal A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Clock signal B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Active-low reset signal A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Active-low reset signal B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit input data.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Enable signal for data synchronization.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Synchronized 4-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Implements a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer with specified timing constraints.</implementation>
</module>
